name: Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in the butter until tender.
2. Blend soup, milk, and marjoram together.
3. Add the blended mixture to the onion and heat.
4. Combine diced chicken, potatoes, and peas in a casserole dish.
5. Pour the liquid ingredients over the top of the filling.
6. Sprinkle with Bisquick mix or your own tea biscuit recipe made into individual biscuits.
7. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
